seeed_rpcmdns_begin.tooltip: Start the Wio Terminal RPC mDNS responder. The host can be reached as hostname.local.

seeed_rpcmdns_begin_or_print.message0: start mDNS service hostname %1 and print errors
seeed_rpcmdns_begin_or_print.tooltip: Start the mDNS responder and print an error to Serial if startup fails.

seeed_rpcmdns_end.tooltip: Stop and release the mDNS service.

seeed_rpcmdns_set_instance_name.tooltip: Set the displayed service instance name. Keep it within 63 characters.

seeed_rpcmdns_add_service.message0: register mDNS service type %1 protocol %2 port %3
seeed_rpcmdns_add_service.tooltip: Register an mDNS-SD service such as http/tcp/80.

seeed_rpcmdns_add_service_txt.message0: add mDNS service TXT service %1 protocol %2 key %3 value %4
seeed_rpcmdns_add_service_txt.tooltip: Add a TXT record to a registered mDNS service.

seeed_rpcmdns_enable_arduino.message0: enable Arduino OTA mDNS service port %1 %2
seeed_rpcmdns_enable_arduino.tooltip: Advertise the _arduino._tcp service for Arduino network upload discovery.

seeed_rpcmdns_enable_workstation.tooltip: Advertise the _workstation._tcp service for network device discovery.

seeed_rpcmdns_query_host.message0: query mDNS host %1 timeout %2 ms IP
seeed_rpcmdns_query_host.tooltip: Query hostname.local through mDNS and return the IPv4 address string.

seeed_rpcmdns_query_service.tooltip: Query an mDNS-SD service, return the number of services found, and cache results for result blocks.

seeed_rpcmdns_result_hostname.tooltip: Read the hostname for the selected cached service result.

seeed_rpcmdns_result_ip.tooltip: Read the IPv4 address for the selected cached service result.

seeed_rpcmdns_result_port.tooltip: Read the port for the selected cached service result.

seeed_rpcmdns_result_txt_count.tooltip: Read the TXT record count for the selected cached service result.

seeed_rpcmdns_result_has_txt.tooltip: Check whether the selected result contains a TXT key.

seeed_rpcmdns_result_txt_by_key.tooltip: Read a TXT value from the selected result by key.

seeed_rpcmdns_result_txt_by_index.tooltip: Read a TXT value from the selected result by TXT index.
